hook.text: UNITED STAR CUNHA NETS BRACE FOR BRAZIL

beats.text: CUNHA TAPS HOME A REBOUND FOR HIS FIRST WC GOAL
THEN A LEFT FOOT FINISH DOUBLES HIS TALLY TO 2-0
CUNHA'S BRACE REIGNITES DEBATE ABOUT HIS UNITED ROLE

caption: Matheus Cunha sent a message to Old Trafford 🔴 Playing as a centre-forward for Brazil at the 2026 World Cup, Manchester United's striker scored twice against Haiti — tapping in a rebound before drilling a left-foot finish into the top corner. Vinicius Jr added a third as Brazil ran out 3-0 winners. Cunha's performance playing centrally has reignited the big debate: should he start as United's number nine next season rather than being shunted out to the left wing? His World Cup numbers say yes. Where should Cunha play for United? 👇 #mufc #manutd #football #matchday #worldcup #brazil #cunha
